description: Extract technical metadata from three websites (https://check.torproject.org/, https://www.torproject.org/download/, and https://www.eff.org/) using Tor Browser. For each site, obtain the page title, link count, and image count. Additionally, identify the Tor exit IP address from the check.torproject.org page. Compile these findings into a report at /home/ga/Documents/tor_compatibility_report.txt. The report must include the header 'Tor Browser Compatibility Report', the observed exit IP, and the URL, title, link count, and image count for each site.
